div1.entryFree: Stoop or Stoup, subst. a drinking vessel (of uncertain size): Marian, I say! a s. of wine! Tw. II, 3, 14. Tw. II, 3, 14 fetch me a s. of liquor, Hml. V, 1, 68. set me the --s of wine upon that table, V, 2, 278. I have a s. of wine; and here without are a brace of Cyprus gallants that would fain have a measure, Oth. II, 3, 30 (O. Edd. stope).
